PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?artist(SUM(xsd:integer(?salesValue)) AS ?total_sales) ?label WHERE {
  VALUES ?artistType {
    wd:Q5 wd:Q215380
  }
  ?artist wdt:P31 ?artistType .
  ?artist wdt:P136 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q45981 .
  ?artist rdfs:label ?label
  FILTER(lang(?label) = "en")
  .
  ?work wdt:P175 ?artist ; wdt:P2664 ?sales .
  ?sales wikibase:quantityValue ?salesValue .
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?salesValue) > 0)
}
GROUP BY ?artist ?label
ORDER BY DESC(?total_sales)
LIMIT 1
